message: Jake
Meryl
Fabar
The film crew was easily spotted, but somehow today feels livelier than usual.
Hey, I'm really busy today and can't chat much. Sorry.
No, it's my fault for intruding.
Today’s shoot is with Jennifer.
The atmosphere on set is pretty tense, so I'm a bit overwhelmed. Sorry.
Hello.
So it’s a shoot today.
You can tell just by looking, right? It's been so long, I'm a bit nervous.
See
Talk
Listen
Show
Move
System
Situation around here
About Jennifer

Onlookers are gathering around the filming site. It’s already quite late in the day, they must really have nothing to do.
In between scenes, the staff seem busy preparing for the next shoot.
The lush greenery of Central Park is right nearby. It truly has the vibe of an urban oasis.
Thanks to the smooth shooting, everyone seems to be in a good mood. It’s not a bad thing, but...
I wonder if it will be alright from here on out?
Maybe it's due to getting into character for the shoot, but usually...
She looks like a completely different woman.
With her rich golden hair tied back in a messy bun and plain makeup, she successfully creates a pure image.
How's the situation with your daughter going?
I'm sorry, please wait a bit longer.
You don't need to look so embarrassed. Just knowing that my flesh and blood is alive has given me a bit of strength.
Still, it's a strange story, isn't it? I’ve been wanting to meet her so badly, but now that it’s becoming a reality, I feel nervous and scared.
Probably, that's natural.
Natural.
? Well, yes, maybe that is the case.
Lately, I've been feeling very calm.
Why do you ask such things?
There's no deep meaning to it.
To be honest, I don't want to even see her face, but it's work, so it can't be helped.
That woman is all over Martin. It's just so suffocating.
All over the director.
That's right. I have a daughter, don’t I? Once I thought of that, I realized I don’t care about Martin anymore, which is fine.
Is that so?
It won't do to keep clinging to Martin forever.
I want to have a new love soon.
It’s okay. Even in the roles, we have a love-hate relationship, so the atmosphere is perfect.
The filming is,
This is probably my fault, but it seems like there's hardly any progress. Martin is pretty irritable.
There were many issues with the cast.
Oh, it's not just my fault, right?
Well, I am reflecting on it a lot, you know?
Now that I’m involved, I think we can make up for the delays in the schedule, but it seems like adjusting the lead's schedule is a no-go.
Speaking of the lead, it’s Ted, isn't it?
Yeah, that's Ted. It seems like he’s really causing quite a stir. If this keeps up, we might have a change in the main role.
I’m starting to worry whether we can finish at this rate.
Apparently, she was held captive by fans, right?
Oh, yeah.
I heard that from the director too.
Do you really think something like that could happen? I find it hard to believe.
I don’t know what happened, but skipping work like that is just unacceptable. I hope she gets better soon.
Oh, haha.
Totally true.
It really is troublesome, these days' young people.
What a hassle, right?
Do you know a woman named Ginny?
Ginny?　Well...
I don't know anyone with that name, neither acquaintances nor friends.
Is that so.
What’s that about?
I don’t know anyone like that.
Do you recognize this ring?
It seems familiar, sort of.
Whose is it?
I'm looking for the owner or giver of this ring.
I don't know anything about Ginny.
I gave a reflexive excuse. It’s not completely untrue though.
If you found it, why not just hand it over to the police?
I wouldn’t recognize it no matter how many times you show it to me.
But I do seem to remember seeing a design like this somewhere.
Maybe it’s something fairly expensive?
You’re being a bit pushy. At least I’m sure it’s not mine.
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
Ｖ＝
Ｎ＝
